name: reference_v2
_doc: Full v2 (cli_v2.py) parameter reference. Every knob set explicitly to its SynthAorta-mean default; runnable as a single-mode smoke test. The _comments block annotates each parameter (top-level _* keys are ignored by the validator). For default distributions and citations see PARAMETERS_v2.md.

_comments.r_ascending: Ascending aorta radius [mm]. Default 13.7 (SynthAorta mean). Workshop range 8-22.
_comments.r_descending: Descending aorta radius [mm]. Default 12.2. Workshop range 8-20.
_comments.taper_mode: Radius blending across segment boundaries: piecewise / linear / smoothstep. Default smoothstep.
_comments.ascending_length: Ascending aorta length [mm]. Default 50. Workshop range 40-90.
_comments.descending_length: Descending aorta length [mm]. Default 200. Workshop range 150-300.
_comments.arch_R_c: Arch radius of curvature [mm]. Default 40.4 (Gumbel mode). Workshop range 25-60.
_comments.arch_angle_deg: Subtended angle of the arch arc [deg]. Default 180. Workshop range 120-200.
_comments.arch_tilt_deg: RIGID rotation of arch+descending around inlet z-axis [deg]. Default 0. Workshop range -30 to +30.
_comments.arch_twist_deg: GRADUAL twist around z-axis along the arch [deg]. Default 0. Workshop range -45 to +45.
_comments.junction_blend_mm: Cubic-Bezier blend width at each arch junction [mm]. Default 12. 0 = sharp circular-arc corners.
_comments.arch_shape: Arch parametrisation: 'circle' (constraint H <= W <= 2H) or 'ellipse' (any positive W,H). Default circle.
_comments.delta_3: SynthAorta delta_3 multiplier for the cos(2w|x|) Fourier term. 0 = planar, 1 = SynthAorta nominal. Default 0.
_comments.delta_4: SynthAorta delta_4 multiplier for the sin(2w|x|) Fourier term. 0 = planar, 1 = SynthAorta nominal. Default 0.
_comments.segments_radial: Circumferential ring vertices. Default 96. Workshop range 32-192.
_comments.curve_samples: Total centreline sample count. Default 300. Workshop range 100-600.
_comments.arch_span_mm: Optional alternate parametrisation: horizontal arch extent [mm]. Use WITH arch_height_mm to override arch_R_c + arch_angle_deg.
_comments.arch_height_mm: Optional alternate parametrisation: arch peak height above ascending top [mm]. Pair with arch_span_mm.
